title: SNAP MATCH MARKET FINDER - 211info
text: PARTNERS FOR A HUNGER-FREE OREGON AND THE OREGON HUNGER TASK FORCE SNAP MATCH MARKET FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website provides a map that helps to locate farmers' markets in Oregon that provide matching funds, dollar for dollar, for people who use their SNAP (food stamps). Provides the location, hours, and how much funds the market can match. Locator tool includes Double Up and markets that match independently from that program. 2900 SE Stark Street Suite 1-A Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Varies by site Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website to find market locations and hours -Walk in to farmers markets and visit the information booth to receive tokens to use to purchase items from market vendors FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Oregon Trail Card (EBT), or SNAP benefits award letter AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Farmers Markets * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - PARTNERS FOR A HUNGER-FREE OREGON AND OREGON HUNGER TASK FORCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PARTNERS FOR A HUNGER-FREE OREGON AND THE OREGON HUNGER TASK FORCE
